item.title: 20 Marla House For sale In Shamasabad Colony, Multan
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A stunning 20 Marla house is available for sale in Shamsabad Colony, Multan, with a demand of Rs 5.50 Crore. The property is park-facing and located in a prime area. Built with RCC construction and featuring a Spanish elevation, the house boasts Diyar woodwork throughout and an architect-designed airy layout. Amenities include a lawn, garage for 4 cars, and a servant quarter with bath. Utilities comprise 3 electricity meters (1 three-phase), 2 gas meters, and sewerage connected to the new WASA system.

Ground Floor: The main entrance has a Diyar wood door. The floor includes a combined drawing and dining area, spacious TV lounge, office with attached bath and bookshelf, 2 bedrooms with attached baths, modern kitchen, store room, laundry area, and servant quarter. The property offers street access from both front and back.

First Floor: The layout is divided into two portions. Portion 1 features a bedroom with attached bath and adjacent drawing/dining area. A common TV lounge separates the portions. Portion 2 includes a bedroom with attached bath, study, newly constructed kitchen, and terrace/balcony with a beautiful view, also with street access from front and back.

This property combines luxury, functionality, and prime location, making it ideal for a premium family residence.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: 20 Marla luxurious house for sale in Shamsabad Colony Multan, park-facing with modern amenities, 4-car garage, and dual-floor layout.

item.title: 20 Marla House For Sale In DHA Phase 1 - Sector H, Multan
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: A luxurious 20 Marla dream house is available for sale in DHA Multan, Block H, Plot No. 93-H, situated in a prime location. This brand-new, elegantly designed home combines classic and modern architecture with stunning elevation and durable construction. The property features a spacious 4-car porch, 5 beautifully designed bedrooms with attached bathrooms, a stylish TV lounge with media wall, 5 luxury bathrooms plus 1 powder room, 2 modern living rooms, and a separate drawing and dining area. It also includes 3 state-of-the-art kitchens, a dedicated laundry/washing area, and a servant room with attached bathroom. Additional highlights include fancy lighting, decorative wall lights, a large balcony with open views, and a double-sided open layout with a green and relaxing plot. For convenience and security, the house is equipped with 3-phase electricity, solar meter, internet connection, CCTV system, and intercom. Located near prime commercial areas, the Grand Mosque, and parks, this fully developed sector offers a peaceful and family-friendly environment. This property is an ideal choice for luxury and comfortable family living
